overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in ancient warrior attire walking through a rocky desert canyon at dusk. The scene features warm golden-hour lighting on distant mountains, a winding dirt path through the wadi, and sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert canyon trail at dusk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the desert trail through the canyon, approaching the central mountain peak ahead

notable_agents.action: white goat or dog briefly visible at the path edge around 2 seconds before moving out of frame

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
large mountain peak directly ahead at the end of the canyon path
rocky hillside forming the right boundary of the wadi
sandy dirt trail with tire tracks running through the canyon floor
sparse dry bushes and tufts of grass along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through a wide desert canyon at dusk. Rocky cliffs frame the left and right sides while a prominent mountain peak looms ahead in the distance. Sparse dry vegetation dots the sandy ground, and a white animal briefly appears at the path edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding canyon trail with golden hour lighting

events.description: sunlight begins illuminating the right-side mountain faces with warm golden-orange light as the sun sets

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curving path as the canyon opens up, with the trail bending slightly to the right

entered.detail: mountain face on the right side catching the golden hour sunlight, creating warm orange highlights

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the path curves gently right and the central mountain shifts to the left side of the frame. The right-side mountains begin catching the golden sunset light, creating a warm orange glow on the rock faces while the left cliff wall draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open canyon area with sunlit mountains visible ahead in the distance

entered.detail: distant mountain range fully illuminated by golden sunlight at the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal an expansive view of distant sunlit mountains ahead. The central peak has passed out of view to the left, while the golden-lit rock faces now appear further in the distance on the right. The path continues straight through the widening desert valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rocky desert canyon that gradually opens into an expansive, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail framed by towering cliffs, with a prominent mountain peak looming directly ahead and a white animal appearing briefly at the path's edge. As the character progresses, the path curves gently to the right, causing the central mountain to shift toward the left while the opposite rock faces begin to catch the warm, orange glow of the sunset. The scene then expands as the canyon walls recede, revealing a wide desert valley with the golden-lit mountains now appearing in the far distance. Finally, the camera continues straight through the widening landscape, leaving the initial cliffs behind under the fading light of dusk.
